title: ASR Outdoor Tarp Awning Clamps 2pk
description:
The ASR Outdoor Awning Clamp is ideal for holding down tarps while camping or working on home improvement projects! They feature a secure grip with ridges to lock in place and will adjust to various thicknesses. They even attach to the edge of the tarp to provide an extra tying option. Be sure to have them ready whenever you need to use a tarp! Each package includes 2 Awning Clamps.

ASR Outdoor Tarp Awning Clamps 2pk

The ASR Outdoor Awning Clamp is ideal for holding down tarps while camping or working on home improvement projects! They feature a secure grip with ridges to lock in place and will adjust to various thicknesses. They even attach to the edge of the tarp to provide an extra tying option. Be sure to have them ready whenever you need to use a tarp!

Key Features

  • SECURE GRIP: Durable Plastic ridged clamp securely locks in place. Great for locking down tarps
  • ADJUSTABLE SIZE: Will adjust to various thicknesses
  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL: Perfect for Camping, Hiking, Home Improvement Projects
  • COLOR: Black
  • DIMENSIONS: 3.25 inch x 1 inch

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TAC-2
  • UPC: 706569551792
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 3 in

Each package includes 2 Awning Clamps.
